notes: Addresses are organized by primary taxpayer state of residence and whether a payment (check or money order) is enclosed with the paper return.
All 50 states + District of Columbia are present. Use the 'INTL' key for taxpayers living abroad, in U.S. territories (PR, GU, VI, AS, MP), or with APO/FPO/DPO addresses.
The 'without_payment' address routes to the IRS submission processing center; the 'with_payment' address routes payments to a Lockbox bank P.O. Box.
If the IRS retires or relocates a service center mid-cycle, update this file FIRST and bump the fetched_on date.
